explanation: This command adds a certificate to the Root store using the -addstore flag, which matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria. It includes optional flags like -f and -user, which are commonly used in such scenarios.
This command uses URL-encoded spaces (\x20) to obfuscate the command line, which may bypass some simplistic parsing but still matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria for -addstore and ROOT.
This command uses URL-encoded space (\x20) after the -user flag to separate the store name, which may evade some basic detection while still matching the Sigma rule's criteria.
